title: bromus schaffneri
intro: Bromus schaffneri, also known as Schaffner's brome, is a species of grass in the genus Bromus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Bromus schaffneri is often used as a tea or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
